name: sg-site-header
description: Shared sticky header for all sgraph.ai domains. Aurora dark theme, plain text SG/Product logo, nav links, teal accent line, slotted CTA and locale picker.
changes: HTML/CSS derived from sgraph.ai Aurora dark theme (sgraph_ai__website v0.2.0)
Added slot='cta' for optional token bar or CTA widget
Teal accent line via box-shadow on .site-header
external: true per nav item controls target=_blank (no longer auto-detected from href)
active: true per nav item adds class=active
_logo bound to #logo-link to match new HTML template
